channel.title: BlackRoad OS Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on sovereign AI, self-hosted infrastructure, and building the tools you actually own.

item.title: Why I Quit Finance to Build an Operating System
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: I had a Series 7, 63, and 65. I worked at Ameriprise and Securian. Then I built an AI operating system on Raspberry Pis for $38/month. Here's why the jump made more sense than it looks.

item.title: How I Built a Sovereign AI OS for $150/month
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: Five Raspberry Pis, two cloud droplets, 52 TOPS of AI inference, 18 production domains, 200 agents. The full breakdown of what it costs to own your entire stack.

item.title: What is BlackRoad OS and Why We Built It
item.author: amundsonalexa@gmail.com (Alexa Amundson)
item.description: The internet was supposed to be decentralized. Somewhere along the way, it became five companies and a login page. We're building the other thing.
